subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Mahdi! Upon thee be God's salutation. Thy letter hath reached the presence of the Wronged One. We have perused it and have responded thus [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد المهدی علیک سلام الله قد حضر کتابک لدی المظلوم قرئناه اجبناک بهذا
subcodes.subjects: @Hands of the Cause, @prayer for protection, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
